item.title: 叙利亚电信招标项目拟吸引逾10亿美元投资
item.description: 据知情人士透露，叙利亚本月将启动电信牌照招标程序，预计可筹集逾10亿美元资金。此举将助力总统艾哈迈德·沙拉在解除美国制裁后吸引外国投资者的目标。【原文：Syria is set to open an tender this month for a telecommunications license that could bring in more than $1 billion, according to people familiar with the matter, aiding President Ahmed al-Sharaa’s aim to attract foreign investors following the removal of US sanctions.】

item.title: 泰国选举结果获认证 新政府组建更近一步
item.description: 泰国选举委员会认证了2月8日大选结果后，总理阿努廷·查伦比拉库尔距离组建新政府更近一步。认证结果证实其执政党在选举中以压倒性优势击败了民调领先的进步派对手。【原文：Thai Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul inched closer to forming a new government after the country’s election commission certified results of the Feb. 8 vote, confirming his ruling party’s decisive win over a poll-favorite progressive rival.】

item.title: 中东战争持续发酵，亚洲能源买家面临压力
item.description: 随着中东战争阻断了从原油到成品油乃至石化原料的供应渠道，亚洲石油和燃料买家正陷入恐慌。【原文：A sense of panic is spreading among Asian oil and fuel buyers as the war in the Middle East chokes access to everything from crude to refined fuels and feedstocks used to produce petrochemicals.】

item.title: 比特币突破71,000美元大关，加密货币市场全面上涨
item.description: 加密货币市场周三反弹，从中东冲突升级引发的抛售中恢复过来，摆脱了其他资产类别的低迷影响。【原文：Crypto markets rebounded on Wednesday, recovering from a selloff triggered by the escalating conflict in the Middle East and shaking off pain in other asset classes.】

item.title: 瑞士央行再度发出干预威胁，通胀率持续徘徊于零附近
item.description: 瑞士国家银行副行长安托万·马丁表示，随着美国对伊朗开战引发全球市场动荡，该央行干预以遏制瑞郎升值的意愿已有所增强。【原文：Swiss National Bank Vice-President Antoine Martin said the central bank’s willingness to intervene to stem gains in the franc has risen amid fallout in global markets from the US war in Iran.】

item.title: 肯尼亚管道公司首次公开募股超额完成目标5.7%
item.description: 肯尼亚国有管道公司首次公开募股超额完成目标5.7%，这是该东非国家十余年来首次进行此类出售。【原文：The initial public offering of Kenya’s state-run pipeline company, the first such sale for the East African nation in more than a decade, exceeded it starget by 5.7%】

item.title: 瑞士央行公布新钞票设计方案，距离现金公投仅剩数日
item.description: 瑞士国家银行公布了新钞票的设计师，就在该国就将现金写入宪法进行投票的前几天。【原文：The Swiss National Bank unveiled the designer of its new banknotes, days before the country votes on whether to enshrine cash in its constitution.】

item.title: 欧洲债券因能源价格飙升引发通胀风险而延续跌势
item.description: 欧洲债券连续第三个交易日下跌，因油价和天然气价格持续飙升，而美国保护关键中东航道的计划未能平息投资者情绪。【原文：European bonds fell for a third session as oil and natural gas prices continued to surge, with a US plan to protect a crucial Mideast shipping lane failing to calm investor sentiment.】

item.title: 印尼评级展望再遭打击，惠誉下调展望
item.description: 惠誉评级公司将印尼信用评级展望下调至负面，原因是这个东南亚国家的政策不确定性日益加剧。该公司加入了越来越多警告印尼资产风险的机构行列。【原文：Fitch Ratings Inc. lowered its outlook on Indonesia’s credit rating to negative due to increasing policy uncertainty in the Southeast Asian nation, joining a growing group of firms warning of risks to the nation’s assets.】

item.title: 亿万富翁特斯拉大户称已购入100万股英伟达股票
item.description: 亿万富翁柯冠，几年前曾作为特斯拉公司最大个人股东之一崭露头角，周二表示已购入100万股英伟达公司股票。【原文：Billionaire Leo KoGuan, who emerged a few years ago as one of the biggest individual shareholders of Tesla Inc., said he bought 1 million shares of Nvidia Corp. on Tuesday.】

item.title: 伊朗危机持续发酵，印度家庭面临迫在眉睫的燃料短缺危机
item.description: 印度家庭在未来几周将面临液化石油气供应严重短缺的局面。由于战争导致波斯湾地区的液化石油气供应受阻，这场能源危机正不断加剧，而该国作为全球人口最多的国家，其通胀率已然面临攀升风险。【原文：Indian families face the prospect of an acute cooking gas shortage in the coming weeks, as war traps supplies of liquefied petroleum gas in the Persian Gulf, deepening an energy crisis already threatening to drive up inflation in the world’s most populous nation.】

item.title: 依赖天然气的新加坡面临卡塔尔断供导致电费上涨
item.description: 若卡塔尔大型液化天然气出口工厂的停产持续较长时间，新加坡人很可能面临更高的电费账单。【原文：Singaporeans will likely face higher power bills if a shutdown at Qatar’s giant liquefied natural gas export plant proves lengthy.】

item.title: 印尼展望下调，媒体报道；惠誉拒绝置评
item.description: 据印尼多家媒体报道，在普拉博沃·苏比安托总统执政期间监管政策日益模糊的背景下，惠誉评级公司已将印尼国家展望从稳定下调至负面。【原文：Indonesia’s outlook has been revised to negative from stable by Fitch Ratings Inc., several news outlets in the country reported, amid increasing regulatory ambiguity under President Prabowo Subianto.】

item.title: 伍尔沃思警告澳大利亚市场风险，投资南非食品业务
item.description: 伍尔沃思控股有限公司表示，其澳大利亚服装业务在上半年末交易量急剧下滑，而对南非食品部门的投资增加则拖累了利润率。【原文：Woolworths Holdings Ltd. said trading in its Australian apparel business slowed sharply at the end of the first half, while stepped-up investment in its South African food division weighed on margins.】

item.title: 英国住宅开发商巴拉特与维斯特里宣布首席执行官退休
item.description: The bosses of two of Britain’s largest housebuilders, Barratt Redrow Plc and Vistry Group Plc, announced their retirements as the businesses emerge from the deepest slowdown since the global financial crisis.

item.title: 缅甸将限制私家车使用以应对燃油短缺
item.description: 缅甸军政府将于周六起对私家车实施限行措施，以节约燃油。因中东航运路线中断，该国能源供应面临威胁。【原文：Myanmar’s military government will impose limits on private vehicles starting Saturday to conserve fuel as disruptions to Middle East shipping routes threaten the country’s energy supplies.】

item.title: 韩国企业瞄准更多菲律宾交易，尽管地缘政治紧张局势持续
item.description: South Korean defense contractors are looking at more deals and investments in the Philippines to support the Southeast Asian nation’s military modernization amid longstanding geopolitical tensions in the South China Sea.

item.title: 市场暴跌加剧印度IPO申请企业的忧虑
item.description: 中东战事爆发后印度股市的暴跌，成为印度企业寻求上市面临的最新障碍，这使得在连续两年创下发行纪录后，新股发行可能面临长期放缓的前景。【原文：The rout in Indian equities following the outbreak of war in the Middle East is the latest hurdle facing Indian companies looking to go public, raising the prospect of a prolonged slowdown in issuance after two record-breaking years.】

item.title: 欧洲天然气价格维持涨势，交易商权衡美国对霍尔木兹海峡的计划
item.description: European natural gas held near the highest levels in three years as traders assessed a US plan to protect crucial tanker shipping in the Middle East, which has been rattled by the widening conflict.

item.title: 瑞士通胀率再度微幅高于零，持续给瑞士央行施压
item.description: 瑞士2月份通胀率连续第三个月维持在极低水平，凸显出该国央行在避免重新实施负利率政策方面面临的挑战。【原文：Switzerland had only a minimum of inflation in February for a third month, highlighting the challenge for the central bank as it tries to avoid reintroducing negative interest rates.】

item.title: 欧洲投资基金与德国联合资本达成最大规模防务承诺
item.description: 欧洲投资银行正支持风险投资机构Join Capital筹集其第三期基金，该基金旨在投资国防企业。【原文：The European Investment Bank is backing venture capital Join Capital as it raises its third fund, aimed at investing in defense companies.】

item.title: 印度央行创造干预空间，卢比面临新一轮压力
item.description: 印度储备银行已为捍卫卢比汇率创造了更多灵活性，因不断升级的地缘政治紧张局势和关税不确定性正再度对该国货币构成压力。【原文：The Reserve Bank of India has carved out more flexibility to defend the rupee, as rising geopolitical tensions and tariff uncertainty begin to weigh on the currency again.】

item.title: Indonesia Says Board of Peace Talks Paused as Iran Crisis Rises
item.description: Indonesia’s foreign minister said talks on President Donald Trump’s Board of Peace initiative have been put on hold as diplomatic attention shifts to the escalating Middle East conflict involving Iran, Israel and the US.

item.title: Iran War Spurs Emerging Markets Rout, Threatens Investment Case
item.description: The war in Iran has swiftly turned emerging markets into one of the worst places to be for global investors.

item.title: Chinese Bank Halts Abu Dhabi Loan as Creditors Cut Mideast Risk
item.description: Several Chinese financial firms are scaling back exposure to Middle Eastern debt, while regulators are stepping up oversight as the conflict raises concerns over the nation’s extensive lending in the region.

item.title: Saudi Chemical Giant Sabic Names Al-Faqeer New CEO
item.description: Saudi Arabia’s biggest chemical producer Sabic named Faisal Mohammed Al-Faqeer as chief executive officer after Abdulrahman Al-Fageeh announced his resignation, according to a company statement.

item.title: FTSE 100 Set to Rebound After Selloff, Pound Falls
Bayer Forecasts Flat 2026 Profits Amid Roundup Settlement Effort
item.description: Bayer AG forecast profits and sales to be little changed in 2026 as the German agriculture and pharmaceuticals company grapples with generic competition for its blockbuster blood thinner and continued uncertainty over its efforts to contain a pesticide litigation in the US.

item.title: 反贪污委员会调查马来西亚与软银旗下ARM公司的交易，法新社报道
item.description: 据法新社报道，马来西亚反贪污委员会正在调查政府与Arm Holdings Plc公司达成的一项交易中涉嫌的滥用职权、欺诈及治理问题。【原文：Malaysia’s anti-graft agency is investigating alleged abuse of power, fraud and governance issues linked to a deal between the government and Arm Holdings Plc, AFP reported.】

item.title: Adidas Forecasts Higher Profits and Promises Bigger Payouts
item.description: Adidas AG forecast higher profits this year and market share gains through 2028 as the German brand looks to maintain its momentum with retro sneakers and new running and football products.
